MSG_INSTALL: Please install them to run the analysis:
MSG_NO_DATA: No valid numerical data found in CSV.
HELP_EPILOG:
[92m[1mRequirements:[0m
  Python 3.7+
  Packages: pandas, numpy, tqdm, colorama
  Install via: [93mpip install pandas numpy tqdm colorama[0m

[91m[1mDisclaimer:[0m
  This script parses CSV logs specifically generated by the [93m`cl_showfps 4`[0m 
  command in Counter-Strike 2. Please note that [93m`cl_showfps 4`[0m is a heavy 
  profiling tool. On low-spec systems, the overhead of logging data every 
  frame can cause a noticeable drop in your actual game performance.

[95m[1mUsage Examples:[0m
  python CsProfAnalyzer.py match_log.csv
  python CsProfAnalyzer.py match_log.csv --brief

GLOSSARY_MAP.Frame FPS: Instantaneous speed. Best for finding stutters.
GLOSSARY_MAP.Smooth FPS: Trailing average. This is what you see in the HUD.
GLOSSARY_MAP.Frame MS: Time to render one frame (ms). Lower is better.
GLOSSARY_MAP.Server Frame MS: Server tick processing time. High = Server Lag.
GLOSSARY_MAP.1% Low: Performance at the 1st percentile. Fluidity check.
